mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_chat_turn_metric ( session_id, user_id, turn_id, agent_id, status, error_type, duration_ms, knowledge_hit, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{turnId}, CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), #{status}, #{errorType}, #{durationMs}, #{knowledgeHit}, #{createdAt} )
